cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this partner switching problem. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start of the song. Their partners are Sam, Izzi, Jamie, Ophelia, and Patrick, respectively. The question is about tracking who Claire ends up with after a series of partner switches. First, let me list out the initial pairings to keep track: - Alice → Sam - Bob → Izzi - Claire → Jamie - Dave → Ophelia - Eve → Patrick Now, the partner switches happen in a sequence. Let me go through each step one by one. Maybe I should make a table or track each person's partner after each swap. First swap: Bob and Dave switch partners. So, Bob was with Izzi, Dave was with Ophelia. After switching, Bob will have Ophelia, and Dave will have Izzi. So after first
